description: User pauses on the 'Loan term left' field before interacting with it.
frame_description: The user is viewing a home loan calculator with the loan term set to 20 years.

description: User clicks the 'Loan term left' dropdown to open the selection menu.
frame_description: The dropdown menu opens, displaying a list of years.

description: User selects '25' from the loan term dropdown menu.
frame_description: The selection is made, the dropdown closes, and the loan term updates to 25.

description: A 'Need help?' chat modal automatically appears and the monthly repayment amount updates.
frame_description: A green modal with 'Need help?' text covers part of the screen.

description: User pauses to look at the 'Need help?' modal.
User clicks the close button ('X') on the 'Need help?' modal.
frame_description: The modal is dismissed, revealing the updated calculator results.

description: User reviews the updated monthly repayment amount of $2,515.
frame_description: The calculator shows the new repayment amount for a 25-year loan term.
